task_completion.description: Load the specified EEG recording in Playback mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI system control panel indicates 'PLAYBACK' mode and the file 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' is selected or actively playing.

task_completion.description: Configure the analysis environment with Band Power and FFT Plot widgets
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GUI layout displays at least two panels specifically titled 'Band Power' and 'FFT Plot'.

task_completion.description: Set a 1-50 Hz bandpass filter and a 100 µV vertical scale for the Time Series
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Time Series widget or global filter settings show a bandpass filter (BP) set to '1-50 Hz' (or '1.0-50.0 Hz'), and the vertical scale (Vert Scale) is set to '100 µV'.

task_completion.description: Enable Expert Mode in the OpenBCI GUI
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Expert Mode' button or toggle in the GUI is visibly enabled, highlighted, or checked.

task_completion.description: Capture a screenshot of the analysis setup
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the screenshot button (camera icon) in the OpenBCI GUI, uses a system screenshot tool, or a newly created screenshot file is visible in the file manager.
The agent clicks 'Save Settings' (or similar) in the OpenBCI GUI, or a saved settings file is visible in the file manager.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 interface being used, rather than a text editor modifying config files or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The data shown in the plots appears to be genuine EEG data
integrity.visual_evidence: The Time Series and FFT plots show fluctuating, realistic EEG waveforms and frequency peaks, not empty plots or static placeholder images.

integrity.description: The agent configured the environment via the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the GUI dropdowns and settings to configure the widgets, filters, and scales, rather than solely running terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2. The recording is an 8-channel, 250 Hz EEG file from PhysioNet Subject S001 (eyes open baseline). The file to be loaded is 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' in PLAYBACK mode. The GUI must display 'Band Power' and 'FFT Plot' widgets. The bandpass filter must be set to 1-50 Hz and the Time Series vertical scale to 100 µV. Expert Mode must be enabled. The agent must capture a screenshot (often via the camera icon in the GUI) and save the settings configuration.
